fields.description:
## Context / Problem
`rebar review-code` runs the same four-pass reviewer the Gerrit bot casts `LLM-Review`
with, so an author can preview code-review findings locally before pushing — the exact
analog of `rebar review-plan` for the plan gate. But the code-review on-ramp never
mentions it: the plan-review author can discover their local self-check, the code-review
author cannot. This closes that discoverability asymmetry so both gates read symmetrically.

## Approach
Surface `rebar review-code` in the same three places plan review's local self-check is
surfaced: the author on-ramp (`docs/passing-code-review.md`, printed by `rebar explain
review`), the docs index (`docs/README.md`), and the canonical `AGENTS.md` pointer.
Rejected: adding a new `rebar explain` topic for local code review — the existing `review`
guide is the right home, and a second topic would fragment the on-ramp rather than fix
discoverability.

## Scope
- docs/passing-code-review.md  (new "Preview the review locally" section, intro cross-link, loop-diagram preview step)
- docs/README.md               (index entry mentions the local preview)
- AGENTS.md                    (code-review pointer names `rebar review-code`)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `docs/passing-code-review.md` has a "Preview the review locally" section teaching
      `rebar review-code`, incl. the `[agents]` extra and `REBAR_VERIFY_ENABLE_CODE_REVIEW`
      enabling requirement; verified by
      `grep -q 'REBAR_VERIFY_ENABLE_CODE_REVIEW' docs/passing-code-review.md && grep -q '## Preview the review locally' docs/passing-code-review.md`.
- [ ] The loop diagram in `docs/passing-code-review.md` shows the optional local
      `rebar review-code` preview step; verified by
      `grep -q 'rebar review-code — optional local preview' docs/passing-code-review.md`.
- [ ] The `docs/README.md` passing-code-review index entry names `rebar review-code`;
      verified by `grep -A2 'passing-code-review.md)\*\*' docs/README.md | grep -q 'rebar review-code'`.
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` code-review pointer names `rebar review-code`; verified by
      `grep -q 'preview the review locally with .rebar review-code' AGENTS.md`.
- [ ] The intro anchor link resolves to the new section heading (GitHub-generated anchor
      `#preview-the-review-locally-before-you-push` matches the heading text); verified by
      `grep -q '#preview-the-review-locally-before-you-push' docs/passing-code-review.md`.
